scripts.postinstall: pnpm -C ui install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C lambdas install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C tests install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.test: pnpm -C ui run test && pnpm -C lambdas run test
scripts.test:playwright: UI_BASE_URL=$(terraform -chdir=local-environment/infra output -raw ui_url) API_BASE_URL=$(terraform -chdir=local-environment/infra output -raw api_base_url) pnpm -C tests run test:chrome
scripts.format: (git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -z; git diff --name-only --cached --diff-filter=ACMR -z) | sort -zu | xargs -0 sh -c '[ "$#" -gt 0 ] && pnpm run format:pre-commit -- "$@"' sh
scripts.lint: pnpm -C ui run lint && pnpm -C lambdas run lint && pnpm -C tests run lint
scripts.local:start: pnpm run local:backend:start && pnpm run local:terraform:init && pnpm run local:deploy && pnpm run local:frontend:up
scripts.local:stop: pnpm run local:terraform:destroy && COMPOSE_PROFILES=* pnpm run local:compose:down
scripts.local:restart: pnpm run local:stop && pnpm run local:start
scripts.local:deploy: NODE_ENV=development pnpm run build:lambdas && pnpm run package:lambdas && pnpm run local:terraform:apply
scripts.local:backend:start: COMPOSE_PROFILES=backend pnpm run local:compose:up && pnpm run local:service:db:migrate
scripts.local:frontend:start: pnpm run local:terraform:env && pnpm run local:frontend:up
scripts.local:service:db:migrate: pnpm run local:compose -- --profile backend up --build db-migrate
scripts.local:terraform:apply: bash local-environment/scripts/localstack/ensure-localstack-running.sh && pnpm run local:terraform -- apply -auto-approve -parallelism=30 && pnpm run local:terraform:env
scripts.local:service:lambda:disable: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test aws lambda put-function-concurrency --function-name hometest-service-$LAMBDA --reserved-concurrent-executions 0 --endpoint-url http://localhost:4566 --region eu-west-2
scripts.local:service:lambda:enable: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test aws lambda delete-function-concurrency --function-name hometest-service-$LAMBDA --endpoint-url http://localhost:4566 --region eu-west-2
